title: Backrooms Found Footage: Lightweighted
description: Modpack that makes SpacePotato's Backrooms mod more immersive, without adding much!
body:
# Backrooms Found Footage: Lightweighted
Modpack that makes SpacePotato's Backrooms Found Footage mod more immersive without adding much!

## Info
Just download and press play! Everything is configured and downloaded already.
Essential mod is added to allow people to play multiplayer without adding additional stuff.

To get inside the backrooms, suffocate with falling blocks like sand.
> The hunger bar is removed, since there is a custom stamina system and instead, eating food just gives you health.

Big thanks to SpacePotato for creating the mod and letting me use it in this modpack!

If you want some additional information, you can see the [source](https://github.com/SpacePotatoee/MinecraftFoundFootage) and the [wiki](https://github.com/SpacePotatoee/MinecraftFoundFootage/wiki) of the mod.

## Controls
- Hold "Shift" to Run
- Hold "Control" to Crouch
- Press "F" for flashlight
- Press "V" to configure voice chat
- Press "Middle Mouse Button" to ping the location you're looking at
- Press "B" to sort your inventory
- Hold "C" to zoom and scroll to zoom in/out

This modpack mostly offers client-sided additions, so it should not be server-heavy.

Any bugs report on the comment section under this post -> [here](https://youtube.com/post/UgkxnzdSHMFvSFWU1V3NUnVQa0zrriiKaTcP?si=ImdFvUBR4Mx5QUYg)

## _Important note!_
If its your first time playing this backrooms mod, just so you know. It can be scary
![face](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c82b075bbf3d5ecfafbecf3294e30849826a9443_0.webp)
